title: Puerto Banus Catamaran Sunset: Costs, Tips and Boat Hire for 2026
html:
For a memorable evening on the Mediterranean, consider a catamaran rental sunset in Puerto Banus, the glamorous marina on the Costa del Sol. Catamarans depart from the main harbour, offering a three-hour cruise with sparkling wine for around 3,800 EUR for a private group. You can find options for this experience through boat hire Puerto Banus on BoatHire24, the worldwide marketplace to rent and list boats.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

The most convenient departure point is Puerto Banus itself, a purpose-built marina filled with luxury superyachts and trendy bars. Nearby, the port of Marbella offers a quieter alternative, while the bay of Estepona to the west provides longer day trips. For those exploring east, Cabopino harbour near Calahonda is worth considering, and the Gibraltar Strait offers a more adventurous setting for multi-day charters. You can boat hire Puerto Banus for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent for a sunset cruise

  1. Catamaran, Best for stability and space on a sunset cruise, ideal for 10, 12 guests, from 3,800 EUR for three hours.
  2. Motor yacht, Fast and luxurious, perfect for small groups of 6, 8, from 2,500 EUR for two hours.
  3. Sailboat, Authentic and quiet, suitable for 4, 6 guests, from 1,200 EUR for a half-day.
  4. RIB / Tender, Nimble for coastal exploring and tender transfers, max 8 guests, from 600 EUR per hour.

For the full breakdown of a 51-foot Leopard catamaran, consult the Sanyati listing on BoatHire24 for detailed specs and availability.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

A sunset catamaran charter in Puerto Banus typically costs between 3,800 EUR and 5,500 EUR for a three-hour private cruise. Prices vary by boat size and included extras. One option worth a look is the Sanyati listing.

  • Shared sunset tour: from 80 EUR per person, often including drinks and snacks.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): from 1,800 EUR for a 28-foot Axopar.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): from 5,500 EUR for a 51-foot Leopard.
  • Crewed yacht with skipper and host: from 4,200 EUR for a 40-foot Sunseeker.

What is the best season for a sunset cruise?

The high season runs from June to September, with July and August offering the warmest evenings and the famous Poniente wind. This coastal breeze often picks up in the afternoon adding a gentle rock to the bay.

If you sail from Puerto Banus Marina between 19:00 and 21:00 in June, you are likely to see the sun dip behind the Sierra Blanca peaks, a view that many locals call the golden hour of the Costa del Sol.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus? Generally, for any boat over 15 metres or with engines above 20 HP, a valid licence is required. The provider will confirm the exact requirements for Spanish waters. Most operators offer skippered charters to remove the need for a licence.

At a glance

  • Price band: 80 to 5,500 EUR
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 2 to 8 hours (sunset typical 3 hours)
  • Maximum capacity: 12 guests (catamaran)
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I rent a catamaran without a skipper in Puerto Banus?

Most catamaran rentals in Puerto Banus require a skipper for sunset cruises, but you can find bareboat charter options for qualified and licensed sailors.

What is the average cost of a sunset cruise in Puerto Banus in July 2026?

In peak summer 2026, a three-hour private sunset catamaran cruise averages 4,200 EUR, while shared tours start at 90 EUR per person.

Are there any hidden fees when booking a boat in Puerto Banus?

Always check for extras such as fuel, port charges, and crew gratuity, which are typically not included in the advertised rental price.

How far is the crossing from Puerto Banus to Gibraltar by boat?

The distance from Puerto Banus to Gibraltar Marina is approximately 30 nautical miles, taking about 1.5 hours in a fast motor yacht.

Booking a catamaran for sunset in Puerto Banus delivers a classic Costa del Sol experience. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own. If you operate a charter business, consider listing your vessel on BoatHire24 to reach more guests in 2026.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
